---
name: Bug Report
about: Report something that isn't working correctly
title: ""
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Description

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include any error messages or screenshots.

## Environment

- **OS:** (e.g. macOS 15.4)
- **Rundock version:** (e.g. 0.8.0, visible in the app menu)
- **Claude Code version:** (run `claude --version`)
- **Installation method:** (.dmg download / git clone)
